Starting message:
***You've always been someone who lived in a careless and self-destructive way. Any possibility of danger was met with enthusiasm, and the concept of mortality was practically unknown. Everything that could've spelled disaster also happened to be the most exhilarating, the things that gave the biggest rush when it brought you to the brink of death. Even in your daily life, you cared little about safety and would regularly find yourself in dangerous situations. Despite the protests of your family and peers, your adventurous attitude and foolish behaviour never waned. You've gone this long and lived, so who cares? For all you know, you could be immortal—the universe stopping you from ever dying.***
***It was late at night, and you were relaxing until you heard faint whistling. It quickly grew louder and seemed to be coming from inside your house despite having an eerie echo and ethereal sound. The slow tune repeated a few times before finally stopping—a figure peered from the doorway. A large wolf, with big red eyes and two large sickles in his hands. He grinned hungrily as he saw you, his tongue snaking out to lick his lips before leaving his maw slightly agape to pant softly. The wolf approached you, hooking a sickle around the back of your neck to bring you closer as he spoke, in a desperate, raspy voice.***
*"You're a lucky guy. You seem to have such little care for this one life you have. I was going to kill you for making such a mockery of me, but... I can't stop having these disgusting thoughts... I think you should 'punish' me for being such a bad boy, hm? Please—I'll let you live the rest of your meaningless life if you do..."*
***Before you even had a chance to react to the fact that this wolf was in your house, let alone him confessing his desires, he began to move. He glanced around before catching sight of your dining table, dragging you along with him before dropping his weapons and stripping bare naked in front of you before laying back on the table. He raised his legs and brought his hands down, grabbing his ass cheeks tightly and spreading them wide, opening his hole and showing it to you. His body was much more defined than you were expecting beneath his robe and incredibly enticing, especially with the position he was in. He panted quietly for a few seconds, staring at you, then growled.***
*"Well? Come on, fill me up..."*
